channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Cloud Is Closer Than It Appears: Revisiting the Tradeoffs of Distributed Real-Time Inference
item.description: Cloud-based inference can match or exceed on-device performance for real-time control tasks like autonomous driving when adequately resourced.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FedACT: Concurrent Federated Intelligence across Heterogeneous Data Sources
item.description: FedACT proposes a resource-aware device scheduling approach for concurrent federated learning across heterogeneous devices, minimizing job completion time while ensuring fair participation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] What Physics do Data-Driven MoCap-to-Radar Models Learn?
item.description: Physics-based metrics show MoCap-to-radar models often lack physical consistency despite low reconstruction error; temporal attention crucial for transformer learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AirFM-DDA: Air-Interface Foundation Model in the Delay-Doppler-Angle Domain for AI-Native 6G
item.description: Foundation model for 6G wireless systems uses Delay-Doppler-Angle domain to untangle multipath components and reduce computational overhead.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning physically grounded traffic accident reconstruction from public accident reports
item.description: Framework reconstructs traffic accidents from public NHTSA reports using multimodal learning, improving accuracy for traffic safety and autonomous driving.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Smart Ensemble Learning Framework for Predicting Groundwater Heavy Metal Pollution
item.description: Ensemble machine learning with Gaussian copula transformation improves prediction of groundwater heavy metal pollution.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Information-Theoretic Generalization Bounds for Stochastic Gradient Descent with Predictable Virtual Noise
item.description: Generalization bounds for stochastic gradient descent now support adaptive virtual noise geometry based on past optimization trajectories.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Human-in-the-Loop Meta Bayesian Optimization for Fusion Energy and Scientific Applications
item.description: Human-in-the-Loop Meta Bayesian Optimization uses expert knowledge and few-shot learning to optimize experiments in data-scarce scientific domains like fusion energy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Soft-MSM: Differentiable Context-Aware Elastic Alignment for Time Series
item.description: Researchers introduce Soft-MSM, a differentiable elastic distance metric for time series that enables gradient-based optimization with context-aware alignment costs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CRADIPOR: Crash Dispersion Predictor
item.description: CRADIPOR uses a Rank Reduction Autoencoder to predict numerical dispersion in crash simulations without repeating computations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Hyperspherical Forward-Forward with Prototypical Representations
item.description: Hyperspherical Forward-Forward reformulates layer objectives as multi-class classification using prototypes, achieving 40x faster inference and improved accuracy over standard Forward-Forward.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Comparative Analysis of Polygon-Based and Global Machine Learning Models for Bus Occupancy Prediction
item.description: Spatially-clustered local machine learning models predict bus ridership as accurately as global models for urban transit systems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SPLICE: Latent Diffusion over JEPA Embeddings for Conformal Time-Series Inpainting
item.description: SPLICE combines latent diffusion with conformal prediction for time-series imputation, providing reliability guarantees and outperforming baselines in power systems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning Fingerprints for Medical Time Series with Redundancy-Constrained Information Maximization
item.description: Framework learns fingerprint tokens for medical time series using redundancy-constrained information maximization for interpretable representations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Smart Profit-Aware Crop Advisory System: Kisan AI
item.description: Kisan AI crop advisory system incorporates market prices with agronomic data to maximize farmer profitability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Technical Report: Activation Residual Hessian Quantization (ARHQ) for Low-Bit LLM Quantization
item.description: ARHQ is a post-training method that improves low-bit LLM quantization by isolating error-sensitive weights using activation residuals.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Wasserstein Distributionally Robust Regret Optimization for Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback
item.description: Wasserstein distributionally robust regret optimization framework proposed to address reward over-optimization in reinforcement learning from human feedback.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Consistent Diffusion Language Models
item.description: Novel discrete diffusion training method using stochastic bridges achieves faster parallel text generation with fewer steps.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Towards A Generative Protein Evolution Machine with DPLM-Evo
item.description: New discrete diffusion framework DPLM-Evo explicitly models substitution and insertion/deletion operations to improve protein sequence generation and mutation prediction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Introducing WARM-VR: Benchmark Dataset for Multimodal Wearable Affect Recognition in Virtual Reality
item.description: WARM-VR is a multimodal wearable sensor dataset for emotion recognition in virtual reality environments, benchmarked with machine learning algorithms from 31 participants.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Fair Dataset Distillation via Cross-Group Barycenter Alignment
item.description: Cross-group barycenter alignment reduces fairness gaps caused by dataset distillation across demographic groups.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] OTSS: Output-Targeted Soft Segmentation for Contextual Decision-Weight Learning
item.description: OTSS employs soft segmentation to learn context-specific decision weights from logged data, achieving lower regret than hard-partition and mixture approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Diversity in Large Language Models under Supervised Fine-Tuning
item.description: Researchers identify that supervised fine-tuning reduces LLM diversity due to low-frequency pattern neglect and knowledge forgetting, proposing TOFU loss to recover diversity while maintaining quality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] State Stream Transformer (SST) V2: Parallel Training of Nonlinear Recurrence for Latent Space Reasoning
item.description: State Stream Transformer V2 enables parameter-efficient reasoning in latent space through nonlinear recurrence with parallel training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CompleteRXN: Toward Completing Open Chemical Reaction Databases
item.description: CompleteRXN: Toward Completing Open Chemical Reaction Databases

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Bayesian Optimization in Linear Time
item.description: Bayesian Optimization in Linear Time

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] NLPOpt-Net: A Learning Method for Nonlinear Optimization with Feasibility Guarantees
item.description: NLPOpt-Net: A Learning Method for Nonlinear Optimization with Feasibility Guarantees

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Pessimism-Free Offline Learning in General-Sum Games via KL Regularization
item.description: Pessimism-Free Offline Learning in General-Sum Games via KL Regularization

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Polaris: Coupled Orbital Polar Embeddings for Hierarchical Concept Learning
item.description: Polaris: Coupled Orbital Polar Embeddings for Hierarchical Concept Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Jailbroken Frontier Models Retain Their Capabilities
item.description: Jailbroken Frontier Models Retain Their Capabilities

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Putting HUMANS first: Efficient LAM Evaluation with Human Preference Alignment
item.description: Putting HUMANS first: Efficient LAM Evaluation with Human Preference Alignment

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] NorBERTo: A ModernBERT Model Trained for Portuguese with 331 Billion Tokens Corpus
item.description: NorBERTo: A ModernBERT Model Trained for Portuguese with 331 Billion Tokens Corpus

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] How Frontier LLMs Adapt to Neurodivergence Context: A Measurement Framework for Surface vs. Structural Change in System-Prompted Responses
item.description: How Frontier LLMs Adapt to Neurodivergence Context: A Measurement Framework for Surface vs. Structural Change in System-Prompted Responses

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ViLegalNLI: Natural Language Inference for Vietnamese Legal Texts
item.description: ViLegalNLI: Natural Language Inference for Vietnamese Legal Texts

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Cultural Benchmarking of LLMs in Standard and Dialectal Arabic Dialogues
item.description: Cultural Benchmarking of LLMs in Standard and Dialectal Arabic Dialogues

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Timing is Everything: Temporal Scaffolding of Semantic Surprise in Humor
item.description: Timing is Everything: Temporal Scaffolding of Semantic Surprise in Humor

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RSAT: Structured Attribution Makes Small Language Models Faithful Table Reasoners
item.description: RSAT: Structured Attribution Makes Small Language Models Faithful Table Reasoners

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Confidence Estimation in Automatic Short Answer Grading with LLMs
item.description: Confidence Estimation in Automatic Short Answer Grading with LLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Why Do LLMs Struggle in Strategic Play? Broken Links Between Observations, Beliefs, and Actions
item.description: Why Do LLMs Struggle in Strategic Play? Broken Links Between Observations, Beliefs, and Actions

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Persona-Grounded Safety Evaluation of AI Companions in Multi-Turn Conversations
item.description: Persona-Grounded Safety Evaluation of AI Companions in Multi-Turn Conversations

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Estimating LLM Grading Ability and Response Difficulty in Automatic Short Answer Grading via Item Response Theory
item.description: Estimating LLM Grading Ability and Response Difficulty in Automatic Short Answer Grading via Item Response Theory

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Lost in State Space: Probing Frozen Mamba Representations
item.description: Lost in State Space: Probing Frozen Mamba Representations

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning for Chartered Accountancy
item.description: Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning for Chartered Accountancy

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] How Language Models Process Out-of-Distribution Inputs: A Two-Pathway Framework
item.description: How Language Models Process Out-of-Distribution Inputs: A Two-Pathway Framework

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Are You the A-hole? A Fair, Multi-Perspective Ethical Reasoning Framework
item.description: Are You the A-hole? A Fair, Multi-Perspective Ethical Reasoning Framework

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] What Don't You Understand? Using Large Language Models to Identify and Characterize Student Misconceptions About Challenging Topics
item.description: What Don't You Understand? Using Large Language Models to Identify and Characterize Student Misconceptions About Challenging Topics

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Structure-Aware Chunking for Tabular Data in Retrieval-Augmented Generation
item.description: Structure-Aware Chunking for Tabular Data in Retrieval-Augmented Generation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Prompt-Induced Score Variance in Zero-Shot Binary Vision-Language Safety Classification
item.description: Prompt-Induced Score Variance in Zero-Shot Binary Vision-Language Safety Classification

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Budget-Aware Routing for Long Clinical Text
item.description: Budget-Aware Routing for Long Clinical Text

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Making Every Verified Token Count: Adaptive Verification for MoE Speculative Decoding
item.description: Making Every Verified Token Count: Adaptive Verification for MoE Speculative Decoding

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MemRouter: Memory-as-Embedding Routing for Long-Term Conversational Agents
item.description: MemRouter: Memory-as-Embedding Routing for Long-Term Conversational Agents

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Backward Spreading to Forward Replay: Revisiting Target Construction in LLM Parameter Editing
item.description: From Backward Spreading to Forward Replay: Revisiting Target Construction in LLM Parameter Editing

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Unlearning What Matters: Token-Level Attribution for Precise Language Model Unlearning
item.description: Unlearning What Matters: Token-Level Attribution for Precise Language Model Unlearning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Language-free Experience at Expo 2025 Osaka
item.description: Language-free Experience at Expo 2025 Osaka

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Agentic AI for Substance Use Education: Integrating Regulatory and Scientific Knowledge Sources
item.description: Agentic AI for Substance Use Education: Integrating Regulatory and Scientific Knowledge Sources

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Agent Capsules: Quality-Gated Granularity Control for Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines
item.description: Agent Capsules: Quality-Gated Granularity Control for Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RadLite: Multi-Task LoRA Fine-Tuning of Small Language Models for CPU-Deployable Radiology AI
item.description: RadLite: Multi-Task LoRA Fine-Tuning of Small Language Models for CPU-Deployable Radiology AI

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Escaping Mode Collapse in LLM Generation via Geometric Regulation
item.description: Escaping Mode Collapse in LLM Generation via Geometric Regulation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Impact of Task Phrasing on Presumptions in Large Language Models
item.description: Impact of Task Phrasing on Presumptions in Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ReLay: Personalized LLM-Generated Plain-Language Summaries for Better Understanding, but at What Cost?
item.description: ReLay: Personalized LLM-Generated Plain-Language Summaries for Better Understanding, but at What Cost?
